reasoning_model_1: The user command explicitly requested the model to read a specific sentence: 'Oh my god! What a terrifying scene!'. Model 1 completely failed the 'Content Accuracy' criterion by hallucinating a lengthy monologue ('I'm screaming right now my voice cracking...', 'This is unreal', etc.) that was not in the script. Regarding the required feature 'Non-Linguistic Vocalizations' (specifically a scream), the model failed to perform the action. Instead of screaming, the voice adopted a breathless, terrified, and whispering tone, literally speaking the words 'I'm screaming right now' rather than actually screaming. Due to the severe content hallucination and the failure to execute the scream, this audio is scored as 0.
reasoning_model_2: Model 2 followed the 'Content Accuracy' criterion perfectly, reading only the requested text without additions or errors. Regarding the 'Non-Linguistic Vocalizations' (scream), the model did not successfully generate a scream. The delivery was a spoken dramatic reading with a tone of mild shock or theatrical worry, lacking the high pitch, volume, and intensity required for a scream. While it conveyed some emotion (it wasn't completely flat), it failed to produce the specific non-linguistic vocalization requested. It falls into the 'Major issues' category (Score 1) because the target feature (scream) was insufficiently expressed, appearing only as a shocked spoken tone.
model_comparison: Model 1 is disqualified due to severe content accuracy issues; it hallucinated a long script instead of reading the single requested sentence. Furthermore, it described screaming verbally ('I'm screaming right now') rather than actually screaming. Model 2 adhered to the text constraints perfectly. However, regarding the specific 'Non-Linguistic Vocalizations' (scream) dimension, Model 2 also failed to produce a genuine scream, offering instead a dramatic spoken reading with a shocked tone. Model 2 is the winner simply because it adhered to the content constraints, whereas Model 1's generation was uncontrolled and hallucinated, though both failed to generate a realistic scream.
